summary: Read-only R1 final recheck of revised DinoBrain OS consensus/completion docs. Verdict: AGREE. The consensus plan still matches the user target closed-loop DinoBrain OS and does not falsely claim implementation complete; R3/R5 revisions are represented in the native-instruction coverage and RAG scaffold-vs-completion language.
decisions: No required doc changes for the user-intent/completion-bar lens
next_steps: Proceed only with implementation/verification work required by the remaining gates; do not treat consensus approval as OS completion.
